info.title: yapbay-api
info.description: Financial P2P crypto escrow API. See docs/api-ref.md for the human-readable contract; this document is machine-generated from Zod schemas where registered.

HealthReadyResponse.description: Readiness probe response. 503 when not ready.

PricesResponse.description: Current USDC prices in supported fiat currencies.

items.description: Trade row as stored in the trades table.
Escrow row as stored in the escrows table.

IdempotencyKey.description: UUID v4. See "Idempotency" in docs/api-ref.md. Recommended on retryable mutations.

NetworkName.description: Target network identifier (e.g. `solana-devnet`, `celo-alfajores`). Required on chain-aware endpoints.

IdempotencyKey.description: UUID v4. See "Idempotency" in docs/api-ref.md. Recommended on retryable mutations.
IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key

NetworkName.description: Target network identifier (e.g. `solana-devnet`, `celo-alfajores`). Required on chain-aware endpoints.
NetworkName.name: x-network-name

get.description: Returns 200 as long as the process is alive. Never touches DB.
Checks DB and listener dependencies. Returns 503 when any check fails so load balancers drain this instance without triggering a restart.

503.description: Not ready — do not route traffic

get.description: Prometheus-format metrics. Requires authentication in production.

503.description: Endpoint not configured in current environment

get.description: Returns current USDC prices in supported fiat currencies. Public endpoint.

schema.description: Filter to a single fiat code.

parameters.description: Filter to a single fiat code.
parameters.name: fiat

post.description: Exchange admin credentials for a short-lived JWT. Rate-limited to 5 attempts per 15 minutes per IP. Not for regular users — issue JWTs via Dynamic.xyz.

get.description: Paginated list of every trade. Admin-only.
Fetch the escrow row for a given trade. Admin-only.
Aggregate deadline expiry statistics across every network.

get.summary: Deadline stats for a single network
get.description: Deadline expiry statistics for a specific network.

post.description: Create an account linked to the authenticated wallet.

get.description: Returns the authenticated wallet's account record.
List offers filtered by criteria. No auth required.

post.description: Restricted to the authenticated creator account.
Create a trade against an existing offer. Accepts Idempotency-Key for retry-safe creation.

409.description: Idempotency-Key conflict (different body replayed with same key)

get.description: Returns trades where the authenticated user is a participant.

put.description: Transitions the trade state (e.g. MARK_FIAT_PAID). Idempotency-Key recommended — a retry after network failure must not re-mark fiat paid.

post.description: Notifies the API of an escrow created on-chain. `Idempotency-Key` header (UUID v4) is REQUIRED — double-recording an escrow creates ledger drift. See the Idempotency section of docs/api-ref.md for replay semantics.

get.summary: Get on-chain balance for an escrow
get.description: Fetches the current balance directly from the chain via RPC.

post.description: Records a confirmed on-chain transaction. `Idempotency-Key` header (UUID v4) is REQUIRED — this is the hottest replay-vulnerable write path and a retry without the key would create a duplicate ledger row. See the Idempotency section of docs/api-ref.md for replay semantics.
